Event: Magic Well - July 2025
Event Date: 04/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A233


Other locations the gear can be found
Adventurer Challenge - Magic Well
Spiked Shoulder Artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Volcanic Activity
The artifact owner shoots fire projectiles at 2 random enemy units. The projectiles deal 275000 pure damage to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The affected enemy units are also set on fire. Burning units take 300000 magic damage, and their healing is reduced by 35% for 3 sec. When burning ends or gets removed, the target explodes. All enemy units in a small radius around the target take magic damage equal to 10% of their max health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
